name: Bug report
about: Something's broken

## What happened

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## What you expected

What you thought should happen.

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, drop screenshots or console output here.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14]
- Browser: [e.g. Firefox 130, Chrome 128]
- Node version: [e.g. 20.11.0]
- Commit / branch: [e.g. `main@abc123`]

## Anything else?

Notes, hunches, context — anything you think might help.
